title: The Sorrows of Satan
writer: Marie Corelli, John Russell, Forrest Halsey
actors: Adolphe Menjou, Ricardo Cortez, Carol Dempster
plot: Geoffrey, a young and impoverished writer, is desperately in love with Mavis, who lives at his boardinghouse and is also pursuing a writing career. Unable to marry her because of his poverty, in his anger he curses God for abandon...
